tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Fortress Around Your Heart                               Sting


[ch]Dsus[/ch]   [ch]C5[/ch]   [ch]F/Bb[/ch]   [ch]C5[/ch]
[ch]Gdim[/ch]   [ch]Ab[/ch]   [ch]Eb/Ab[/ch]   [ch]Ab[/ch]
[ch]C#sus[/ch]   [ch]B5[/ch]   [ch]E/A[/ch]   [ch]B5[/ch]
[ch]Edim[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]C/F[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]

[Intro]
[ch]Dsus[/ch]   [ch]C5[/ch]   [ch]F/Bb[/ch]   [ch]C5[/ch] 8x

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Dsus[/ch]      [ch]C5[/ch]         [ch]F/Bb[/ch]   [ch]C5[/ch]
Under the ruins of a walled city [/tab]
[tab][ch]Dsus[/ch]      [ch]C5[/ch]                 [ch]F/Bb[/ch]   [ch]C5[/ch]
Crumbling towers in beams of yellow light[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dsus[/ch]        [ch]C5[/ch]     [ch]F/Bb[/ch]        [ch]C5[/ch]
No flags of truce, no cries of pity[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dsus[/ch]      [ch]C5[/ch]             [ch]F/Bb[/ch]         [ch]C5[/ch]
The siege guns have been pounding all through the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gdim[/ch]      [ch]Ab[/ch]     [ch]Eb/Ab[/ch]     [ch]Ab[/ch]
It took a day to build the city  [/tab]
[tab][ch]Gdim[/ch]                  [ch]Ab[/ch]             [ch]Eb/Ab[/ch]   [ch]Ab[/ch]  
We walked through the streets in the afternoon[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]C#sus[/ch]   [ch]B5[/ch]               [ch]E/A[/ch]        [ch]B5[/ch]
As I returned across the fields I'd known   [/tab]
[tab][ch]C#sus[/ch]            [ch]B5[/ch]         [ch]E/A[/ch]    [ch]B5[/ch]    
I recognized the walls that I once laid[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#sus[/ch]    [ch]B5[/ch]         [ch]E/A[/ch]        [ch]B5[/ch]
I had to stop in my tracks for fear[/tab]

[tab]    [ch]F#dim[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]D#dim[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]
Of walking on the mines I'd laid[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
And if I built this fortress around your heart[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]D/F#[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  
Encircled you in trenches and barbed wire[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]D/F#[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Am7[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  
Then let me build a bridge, for I cannot fill the chasm[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Cm7[/ch]    [ch]Dm7[/ch]      [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
And let me set the battlements on fire[/tab]

[ch]Dsus[/ch]   [ch]C5[/ch]   [ch]F/Bb[/ch]   [ch]C5[/ch] 2x

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Dsus[/ch]         [ch]C5[/ch]    [ch]F/Bb[/ch]       [ch]C5[/ch]
Then I went off to fight some battle  [/tab]
[tab] [ch]Dsus[/ch]      [ch]C5[/ch]       [ch]F/Bb[/ch]    [ch]C5[/ch] 
That I'd invented inside my head[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gdim[/ch]    [ch]Ab[/ch]       [ch]Eb/Ab[/ch]     [ch]Ab[/ch]
Away so long for years and years[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gdim[/ch]         [ch]Ab[/ch]              [ch]Eb/Ab[/ch]             [ch]Ab[/ch]
You probably thought or even wished that I was dead[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]C#sus[/ch]     [ch]B5[/ch]     [ch]E/A[/ch]     [ch]B5[/ch]
While the armies all are sleeping [/tab]
[tab][ch]C#sus[/ch]       [ch]B5[/ch]       [ch]E/A[/ch]     [ch]B5[/ch]     
Beneath the tattered flag we made[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#sus[/ch]       [ch]B5[/ch]       [ch]E/A[/ch]       [ch]B5[/ch] 
I had to stop in my tracks for fear[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#dim[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]D#dim[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]
Of walking on the mines I'd laid[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]  
And if I built this fortress around your heart[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]D/F#[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  
Encircled you in trenches and barbed wire[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]D/F#[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Am7[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  
Then let me build a bridge, for I cannot fill the chasm[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Cm7[/ch]    [ch]Dm7[/ch]      [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
And let me set the battlements on fire[/tab]

[ch]Dsus[/ch]   [ch]C5[/ch]   [ch]F/Bb[/ch]   [ch]C5[/ch] x2

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Dsus[/ch]            [ch]C5[/ch]   [ch]F/Bb[/ch]       [ch]C5[/ch]
This prison has now become your home  [/tab]
[tab][ch]Dsus[/ch]        [ch]C5[/ch]       [ch]F/Bb[/ch]        [ch]C5[/ch]  
A  sentence you seem prepared to pay[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gdim[/ch]      [ch]Ab[/ch]     [ch]Eb/Ab[/ch]      [ch]Ab[/ch]
It took a day to build the city [/tab]
[tab][ch]Gdim[/ch]                  [ch]Ab[/ch]             [ch]Eb/Ab[/ch]   [ch]Ab[/ch]
We walked through the streets in the afternoon[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]C#sus[/ch]   [ch]B5[/ch]               [ch]E/A[/ch]       [ch]B5[/ch]
As I returned across the lands I'd known  [/tab]
[tab][ch]C#sus[/ch]   [ch]B5[/ch]                    [ch]E/A[/ch]       [ch]B5[/ch]
I recognized the fields where I'd once played[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#sus[/ch]    [ch]B5[/ch]         [ch]E/A[/ch]        [ch]B5[/ch]
I had to stop in my tracks for fear[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F#dim[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]D#dim[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]
Of walking on the mines I'd laid[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]  
And if I built this fortress around your heart[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]D/F#[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  
Encircled you in trenches and barbed wire[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]D/F#[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Am7[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  
Then let me build a bridge for I cannot fill the chasm[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Cm7[/ch]    [ch]Dm7[/ch]      [ch]Eb[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Dsus[/ch]   [ch]C5[/ch]   [ch]F/Bb[/ch]   [ch]C5[/ch]
And let me set the battlements on fire[/tab]

[Outro]
[ch]Dsus[/ch]   [ch]C5[/ch]   [ch]F/Bb[/ch]   [ch]C5[/ch]  repeat until fade out
